name: Spark Coil
description: A humming coil-organ that spits arcs of bio-static. Twitchy, cheap, and everywhere.

name: Thorn Launcher
description: A seed-pod sac that flings hardened thorns. The pod flinches when it fires.

name: Gnasher Jaw
description: A grafted second jaw of scavenged teeth, bolted along the forelimb. It chews on nothing while idle.

name: Ember Spitter
description: A gullet-organ that gargles coals and coughs them at things. Warm to sit near; worse to stand in front of.

name: Bolt Cannon
description: A rigid bone barrel that fires ossified slugs. The recoil travels the whole war-body.

name: Chitin Plate
description: Salvaged shell segments lashed over soft fur. It never quite fits.

name: Basalt Carapace
description: Fused stone plating grown in a factory vat. Heavier than the creature under it.

name: Healing Pod
description: A translucent bud that weeps warm sap onto wounds. It hums when it works.

name: Cooling Gill
description: A fluttering gill-frill that sheds heat and worry alike. Vents strain as fast as the fight builds it.

name: Sensor Stalk
description: An eyestalk on a whip of cartilage, always scanning. The creature learns to ignore it. Mostly.

name: Shield Membrane
description: A contractile caul that snaps taut over the core when triggered. It breathes between uses.

name: Sting Lash
description: A whip of braided nettle-nerve that flinches before it strikes. It stings the limb that carries it, a little, always.

name: Cinder Flick
description: A knuckle of ember-gland that snaps sparks at whatever is closest. It never quite goes out, even at night, even in rain.

name: Static Barb
description: A hooked quill of charged cartilage that discharges on contact. The fur around the graft never lies flat again.

name: Pebble Maw
description: A grafted mouth of gravel teeth that grinds when nervous. It swallows the stones it breaks and asks for more.

name: Brine Jet
description: A siphon-organ that swallows any water offered and returns it as a cutting lance. It gurgles between shots, half-drowning on the creature's behalf.

name: Spit Gland
description: A swollen throat-sac that lobs blistering saliva. It drools constantly, and the drool kills the grass.

name: Bark Wrap
description: Living bark trained around a soft limb. It keeps trying to root whenever the creature stands still too long.

name: Tide Caul
description: A birth-caul of tidal membrane, stretched and re-stretched over the limb. Cool to the touch; it remembers being warmer.

name: Bone Lattice
description: Someone else's ribs, boiled clean and woven into a cage. The fit is wrong in a way no adjustment fixes.

name: Sap Tap
description: A parasitic taproot that drips stolen sugar into the vigor system. The creature gets hungrier; the tap does not care.

name: Glow Bulb
description: A soft lantern-organ that pulses toward whatever moves. Whatever it lights up, someone shoots.

name: Burr Gland
description: A pod of hooked seeds that burrow into scar tissue and hurry the healing. The scars bloom, faintly, in spring.

name: Arc Whip
description: A tendon-lash cultured around a copper spine, still twitching from the vat. It arcs to anything grounded, including friends who stand too close.

name: Mulch Maul
description: A club of compacted deadfall bound in living vine. What it breaks, it composts.

name: Geyser Gland
description: A pressure-bladder that vents scalding water in a bark of steam. It sighs while it recharges, like something remembering the sea.

name: Venom Needler
description: A gland-fed quill rack that spits hollow needles brewed in the creature's own borrowed blood. The needles whistle, softly, on the way out.

name: Slag Maw
description: A furnace jaw that chews everything into cinders and slag. Feeding it is a chore; not feeding it is a mistake.

name: Shale Sling
description: A muscle-sling that hurls fractured shale in flat, skipping arcs. The stones are always warm when they land.

name: Ripsaw Ridge
description: A spine of serrated dorsal teeth that saws on contact. It grew crooked; it cuts fine.

name: Kelp Weave
description: Deep-water kelp braided into a supple mail. It stays wet forever and smells like low tide.

name: Cindershell
description: Kiln-fired carapace, cured while still alive. Warm side in, weeping side out.

name: Drip Sac
description: A distended honey-organ that sweats healing syrup onto open wounds. The sweetness draws flies the creature has learned to ignore.

name: Marrow Battery
description: A transplanted long-bone, hollowed and packed with cultured marrow that trickles vigor back into the host. It aches before storms.

name: Keen Lens
description: A cluster of vat-grown eyes in a chitin housing, all of them yours now. They blink in sequence, never all at once.

name: Storm Lung
description: A bellows-organ that inhales weather and exhales lightning. Between shots it breathes shallowly, the way frightened things do.

name: Magma Gullet
description: A transplanted stomach that digests stone into slurry and vomits it burning. Its previous owner is not discussed.

name: Coral Maul
description: A fist of living reef grown over the limb like a stony glove. Polyps bloom in the dents it leaves.

name: Spore Mortar
description: A puffball chamber that lobs ripe spore-shells in high arcs. Downwind, everything softens and comes apart.

name: Quill Volley
description: A back-rack of harvested quills, re-rooted in borrowed muscle. It bristles when the creature is scared, which spoils the aim, which scares it more.

name: Weeping Ironbark
description: Plates of ironbark that seep amber sap into every wound they cover. The tree it came from is fine. Probably.

name: Magnetite Hide
description: Lodestone scale grown in a factory vat, heavy enough to change the creature's gait. Compasses fail near it; so do most weapons.

name: Gel Bastion
description: A translucent bulwark of ballistic jelly that swallows impacts whole. Things that hit it stay visible inside for a while.

name: Surge Heart
description: A second heart, oversized and out of rhythm, that floods the vigor system between beats. The creature learns to sleep through its pounding.

name: Cradle Gland
description: A womb-warm organ that knits ruined limbs with slow, deliberate tenderness. It hums lullabies at frequencies only the wounded notice.

name: Sun Bore
description: A furnace-heart lance that focuses digestive fire into a beam that unmakes stone. Nothing about carrying it is comfortable, or ever will be.

name: Leviathan Jaw
description: The recovered jaw of something the factories grew once and wisely never grew again. It closes like a verdict.

name: Tempest Organ
description: A cathedral of storm-bladders that builds a private thunderhead over the war-body. The creature under it stops flinching at thunder. That's the sad part.

name: Rot Howitzer
description: A bone barrel sleeved in blight-culture, firing shells that bloom on arrival. The crews who grow them work in silence.

name: Progenitor Aegis
description: Progenitor-pattern plating from the deepest vats, fitted as if it always belonged there. That is exactly what's wrong with it.

name: Caldera Mantle
description: A mantle of layered eruption-stone that turns the whole chassis into weathered terrain. It cools slowly, over years.

name: Second Caul
description: A membrane the factories grew for cores they meant to keep. Triggered, it wraps the core in a second birth.
